label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes column 0x00 (UID) on a Log entry row and receives SUCCESS, but the cited Log table defines 0x00 as UID and the UID section says this column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host. A SUCCESS response is therefore not protocol-compliant.
